name: Chancellor Election
desc: Allied Governments once again wish to elect a Galactic Chancellor to represent their shared interests, and advance the goals of the greater regions

options.name: Senator Marcus Dale
options.effectDesc: Decreases colonization costs by 30%, but increases invasion costs by 11%
options.charDesc: A centrist politician from the Sol Protectorate, Dale has a long decorated career, especially known for successfully ratifying treaties with other factions and governments over territory sharing and border control

options.name: Scion Gessella
options.effectDesc:
Increases all production by 1% for academy professions
Bonus Restricted to: Governor, Diplomat, Merchant, Biologist, Physicist
options.charDesc: A powerful teacher of The Sight, Gessella is chair of the High Council of Scions. Leading the 'Galardieh Academy' on Genetarris, a renowned center of study for science and politics, she aims to advance these schools and their professions to new heights.

options.name: Viceroy Krynn
options.effectDesc: Decreases ship upkeep by 18%, but also reduces cargo space by 9%
options.charDesc: Krynn rose to power leading the largest fixers guild on Sill, expanding the network to several Zones. He now assists in the rule of the entirety of Prispis, known to have connections everywhere.

options.name: Pod-Leader Salune
options.effectDesc: Increases Research Production by 6%, but reduces scrapping yields by 11%
options.charDesc: Technocrat Salune leads the largest research pod congomerate across Krastis, advancing studies in cybernetics and augmentation devices. A technological preservationist, Salune believes in maintaining the history of the Galaxy's innovations.

name: Galactic Survey Expansion
desc: The Galactic Council wishes to commission a new collective survey project, expanding the number of known worlds across the Galaxy.

options.name: Approve
options.effectDesc: Increase number of planets in the Galaxy by 20%

options.name: Reject
options.effectDesc: Keep the number of planets in the galaxy the same.

name: Haelon Piracy
desc: Piracy has grown significantly along major trading lanes, especially across the Haelon Corridor, a large region outside the Galakis Perimeter. The Empyreal Core wishes to raise tariffs considerably to fund more defensive escorts, but the trading guilds are pushing back, arguing that the core should bear most of the cost for securing the regions outside of the Perimeter.

options.name: Raise Galakis Tariffs
options.effectDesc: (raise npc damage cap a little, double tariffs

options.name: Increase Empyreal Funding
options.effectDesc:
increases damage cap against non-player enemies by 15% (for races near the core)
Bonus Restricted to: Taltherian, Litheor, Mylarai, Sillixx

name: Darmos Galactic Host
desc: Darmos is seeking new hosts for the upcoming Darmos Galactic, a seasonal series of Games that brings together participants from across the Galaxy, and is trying to determine which quadrant would be the ideal choice

options.name: Tross Quadrant
options.effectDesc:
Increases production by 2% for races in the Tross Quadrant
Bonus Restricted to: Taltherian, Uldrinan, Inergon, Konqul

options.name: Pract Quadrant
options.effectDesc:
Increases production by 2% for races in the Pract Quadrant
Bonus Restricted to: Vygoid, Litheor, Kronyn, Aerlen, Genetarr

options.name: Aether Quadrant
options.effectDesc:
Increases production by 2% for races in the Aether Quadrant
Bonus Restricted to: Human, Sillixx, Drannik, Lazuli

options.name: Drahj Quadrant
options.effectDesc:
Increases production by 2% for races in the Drahj Quadrant
Bonus Restricted to: Mylarai, Zolazin, Bahreen, Xecti

name: Suzerain Term Limits
desc: The Galactic Council wishes to propose new conditions for Suzerains to hold power within their Zonal areas

options.name: Restrict Suzerains
options.desc: When Zones expire, controlling Suzerains will not be able to Influence the Zone until it expires again.

options.name: Adapt Contested Zones
options.desc: Popular Zones will automatically reduce their duration and/or increase their cost for the next cycle when expiring, eventually returning to baseline.

options.name: Reject Changes
options.desc: Keep the Zonal Influence rules the same for now.

name: Chancellor Election
desc: Allied Governments once again wish to elect a Galactic Chancellor to represent their shared interests, and advance the goals of the greater regions

options.name: Ambassador Thelaru
options.effectDesc: Increases Evolution Gene yields by 12% and reduces Genes cooldown by 12%, but reduces research production by 8%
options.charDesc: A career diplomat from icy Roathir, the Aerlen homeworld, Thelaru has brokered more treaties than any living ambassador, although they are on their 8th clone variant. Thelaru aims to prioritize genetic advancements by redirecting research resources.

options.name: Warlord Krassak
options.effectDesc: Expands all enemy rank ranges by 10%
options.charDesc: Krassak rose through the Konqul military ranks by sheer force of will. He believes strength is the only language the galaxy understands, and he intends to speak it fluently.

options.name: Director Vynn-7
options.effectDesc: Increases all production by 1% for cybernetic races
options.charDesc: Once a Supreme Governor on Vygos, Vynn-7 has since overseen the optimization of the entire Mechanon Hyper-Network... though many of these new efficiencies can only be realized through cybernetic interfaces.

options.name: Luminary Oreth
options.effectDesc: Exotic Matter is 42% more common during mineral acquisition, but mineral storage is reduced by 15%
options.charDesc: An ancient Litheor sage who has witnessed the rise and fall of empires. Oreth counsels patience and renewal, drawing on millennia of accumulated wisdom.
